headline: Xcel Energy to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?

headline: NiSource Inc (NYSE:NI) Sets Up for a Breakout with Perfect Technical Rating
summary: NiSource (NI) shows a perfect 10/10 Technical Rating and a 9/10 Setup Quality Score, creating a low-risk breakout opportunity near a tight resistance zone with clear support levels.
